name: Bean Curd with Broccoli
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Broccoli, including stems and florets
recipeInstructions:
1. In a cup, mix together the cornstarch and 1/4 cup of stock until well combined.
2. Add the dry sherry, soy sauce, and sesame oil to the cornstarch mixture. Stir again.
3. Cut the scallion into 1 1/2 inch lengths.
4. Heat the vegetable oil in a wok over medium heat. When hot, add the ginger and garlic. Stir for about 10 seconds.
5. Add the scallion and broccoli to the wok. Stir-fry for 1 minute.
6. Pour in half a cup of stock and the salt. Bring to a simmer.
7. Cover and cook over medium heat for 1 minute, until the broccoli is tender crisp. Remove the broccoli using a slotted spoon.
8. Reduce the heat to low and add the tofu. Let it heat through.
9. Add the cornstarch mixture. Stir very gently.
10. Return the broccoli to the wok. Serve immediately when the sauce thickens and everything is heated through.
